response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled software engineer with 14+ years of experience and strong fundamentals in performance-conscious systems. However, the role requires deep expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization—domains entirely absent from his background. His experience is uniformly software-focused (web, backend, infrastructure), with only minimal hardware exposure a decade ago. For a Principal-level role demanding immediate subject-matter expertise, the domain gap is too significant to overcome.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with demonstrated focus on performance, testability, and system design across multiple domains
Proven ability to optimize low-latency systems (Dunnhumby microservices, asynchronous I/O, caching strategies) showing performance mindset
Broad technical depth and learning ability evidenced by proficiency across multiple languages and diverse system types (web, mobile, embedded)
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience—a core technical requirement for the role
Completely lacks GPU/AI accelerator hardware optimization background; all experience is software-layer, not hardware architecture
Hardware exposure is minimal and outdated; last hardware-adjacent role was robotic arm development in 2016-2018, no subsequent hardware work

key_factors.factor: Hardware architecture and SoC/IP modeling expertise
AI accelerator optimization and GPU workload knowledge
Software engineering fundamentals and system thinking capability
